column2: Installation of high efficiency wood burning cookstoves in Indonesia 1
column5: Founder & former CEO — CHARGED WITH FRAUD (Oct 2024); company in Chapter 7 bankruptcy (Feb 2025)
column7: Major Indonesian carbon market scandal: C-Quest Capital reported Newcombe to US authorities in mid-2024 for over-issuance fraud. SEC charges in Oct 2024. Filed Chapter 7 bankruptcy in Delaware on 27 Feb 2025. Verra cancelled 5,004,915 VCUs across 27 CQC cookstove projects. VCS3327 (Indonesia 1) and VCS3328 (Indonesia 2) are part of this universe. ICVCM (March 2025) ruled out most cookstove methodologies from CCP-eligible list. Practical implication: existing credits face quality discount; future issuance effectively blocked
From PDD 2022
